title: Redundancy and dismissal
summary: 9609 AS — legal and ethical aspects of ending employment.
learningObjectives: Evaluate HR handling of job losses.

simpleExplanation.title: When jobs end
simpleExplanation.summary: Redundancy occurs when a role disappears; dismissal is ending employment for conduct or capability reasons. Both require careful legal process.
steps: Dismissal: employee at fault or unable.

sections.content: **Redundancy and dismissal** (2.1.4) follows **2.1.3 recruitment**. Contrast **legal terms** precisely in essays.
